reply_points: say she is not failing just learning a hard job
mention the first month is often the toughest
remind her to focus on safety before speed
tell her to ask questions and keep a small checklist
encourage her that confidence comes with more miles
offer to talk if she wants advice

attributes.subject: Rough first month out here
attributes.body: Hey Ms. Davis, I wanted to be honest and say this first month has been rough. I have had a couple of wrong turns, I am slower than the other drivers, and I keep second-guessing myself. Nobody's been mean, but I feel like I might not be cut out for this. If you have a minute, I could really use some advice.

attributes.subject: Updated fuel stop guidance
attributes.body: Please review the revised fuel stop sequence for the northbound route and acknowledge receipt.

attributes.subject: Youth workshop volunteer signup
attributes.body: We are confirming volunteers for next week's vehicle safety workshop. Let us know if you can help.
